strap: Belfast Advanced Manufacturing draws £458m of UKRI lead-led funding across 1,894 grants, anchored by Queen'S University Belfast (40%), Ulster (9%), with Seagate Technology (Ireland) on the industrial side. 17 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £27m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows medium-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — repeated infrastructure commitments reinforce incumbent positions rather than redirecting capability toward new anchors or sub-domain specialisms.
